meaning: adj.(女式服装)夏娜尔式的(尤指一种无领直统茄克衫)
examples: The name Chanel became a byword for elegance.
Frilly dresses are out; Chanel knockoffs are in.
Coco invented the little black dress, perfected a trademark scent-Chanel No. 5-and became famous for her tweed suits and quilted handbags.
Chanel maintained constant, unfiltered contact with the tastes of the public for which she designed.
Chanel was not the sort to rely on intermediaries to form her aesthetic judgments.
